transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: First of all, let me say thank you from SNAD for the scientific help on Apollo 16.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I personally think that you all did a very credible job in helping the science support

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: room and preflighting to get all the experiments ready to prepare the crew and the flight for

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Apollo 16.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think that looking back on it now we can say we had a very successful mission, that we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: obtained a tremendous amount of information from the flight.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I know that the rock boxes back there at the curatorial facility are bursting at their

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: seams and the geologists are going to have a lot to do.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think also that because of the problems that arose and the necessity to change the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: flight plan that you responded quite well to get the maximum science out of the time that

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we had available.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I realize that in all of our flights there hasn't been one flight yet that ran according

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: to schedule and I am very sure that Apollo 17 will be in the same boat, that we will have

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: to change things real time to get the maximum science out of the mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I think the response on this flight was superb.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now today the briefing here is in two parts and for two purposes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: First of all I like each principal investigator to briefly describe the results so far obtained

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: from his work.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is to sort of educate the crew on what we obtained so far from Apollo 16 so that they

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: might have information along that line.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Also I like to have him describe any anomalies that might have occurred that we do not know

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: about now.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And second, then we like to have the PI with the crew working with them to answer, have the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: crew answer any questions that might still be puzzling him so that he might further his analysis

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of the data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We have a lot of people to go through today, a lot of science to cover, so we like to keep

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: each briefing short and we don't want to cover things that are pretty well, that are general

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: knowledge as of today.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we can start right out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: First one is Palmer Dial, Lunar Service Magnetometer.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: After each experimenter describes his experiment we'll have questions Palmer so we'll, we can

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: ask the crew any questions after your particular talk.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's a mic, mic right over there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You may sit, stand, anything you want to do.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, I guess the main functions of both instruments went nominally.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, I'd like to cover both the portable and the surface, if that's acceptable.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, the, the ALSEP instrument, the surface magnetometer that you deployed first looked like

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: it went according to plan.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The field that we measured as soon as it was turned on, I think it was turned on about 15

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: minutes or so after you deployed it, was 230 gamma and in a downward direction.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And at that particular time that was the highest field that we'd ever measured on the, on the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: lunar surface.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The calibration of the instrument went straight forward.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We did do a gradient determination of the field at the site that, the site survey as we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: call it, uh, function normally, the, um, it's, uh, thermal control subsystem is the best that

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we've put on the moon so far.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We have a delta T from a lunar day to lunar night of, uh, 51 degrees centigrade, which is

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: a factor of two better than our Apollo 12 thermal subsystem.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, uh, leveling of the device was, uh, I noticed in the photograph yesterday that, uh, the bubble

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: level was right in the center ring, the, uh, level sensors that we have are accurate to

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: a quarter of a degree and they show that, uh, uh, that the instrument, um, is level to one

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: degree accuracy right now.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, um, um, um, the instrument has new sensors in it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: These are more stable and, uh, it's really the first chance we have of doing network type

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: measurements of the fields on the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We do see whole moon, we have seen simultaneous data now from 15 and 16.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We see the magnetic fields due to eddy currents that are driven in the entire lunar sphere.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, for the first time experimentally, we have always made that assumption that we've

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: got an instrument that's setting on a, at one point on a sphere and that we're looking

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: at the properties of a whole sphere.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we had some experimental evidence that that was the case.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now we have unambiguously shown with this second instrument that that is indeed the case

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and that the assumption is correct that we are looking at a whole spherical response

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, um.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You mean you're seeing eddy currents all the way through the moon, huh?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We're seeing eddy currents that go travel around the whole sphere, but, uh, with these

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: new sensors now and with long-term data, what we, what we're going to try and do is look,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: as you say, right at the center of the moon as they go all the way through.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now that's, uh, what we're waiting for during the lunar night is a nice step function and

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: a long-term, uh, both before and after so we can see, uh, this, these currents diffuse

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: right through the center of the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, um.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The other thing that I think that is, uh, unique about this instrument that, that now

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we have a chance to look at the, uh, as mutual variations in conductivity.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We can not only look at radial, uh, dependence of the electrical conductivity and calculate a temperature,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but now we can look at the, uh, uh, azimuthal or angular variations between, uh, Apollo 15

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and Apollo 16 side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And those, and that spread is far enough so that we ought to be able to extrapolate those

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: measurements to a great circle around the whole moon as far as azimuthal dependence.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, uh, portable magnetometer was really exciting.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Um, first of all, uh, the, uh, field that, uh, the first field I think you measured was 180

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: gamma down and in the Cayley it looked like that all the fields were, uh, in essence pointed

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: in a downward direction and, um, uh, at the ALSEP side it was 230 gamma, up near Spook it was

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: 180 gamma and then on the other side of the LEM where you parked the rover at, um, um, at

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the last, uh, station it was 120 gamma and at that station you put a, um, a rock on it

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and it looks like we measured about 4.7 gamma from that rock.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So the rock was large enough and it hasn't large enough moment that it looks like we did

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: see a difference.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: These measurements do have an air bar on them that is like plus or minus, uh, uh, as much

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: now as, uh, 5 to 10 gamma because the solar wind and all the other inductive fields that

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: are around that have to be subtracted out of the measurements from our, uh, magnetic, uh,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: from the tape and data reduction.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, um, the measurements at, uh, at, um, station five, uh, were, uh, pointed upward, uh, that

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: was a, and, uh, the measurements up near North, uh, Ray crater were pointed downward at 318 gamma.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think that there we, they, there are some, uh, things that we would, uh, we could probably

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: say, uh, uh, making a lot of assumptions, but it looks like if this highland material is

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: older than the other, it looks like that we have a, at least a chance of looking at the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: paleomagnetic history of the, of the lunar crust from these measurements.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The high fields indicate that, uh, that either the, uh, the perming source, the source of

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: this field was, um, uh, if it remains stable over the time period that the Maria was, uh,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: were cooling, then the, uh, highland material would indicate this high field would indicate

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: that it, it, uh, that it indeed had a time variation in its magnitude or that the Maria,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the, the flooding of the Maria basins or whatever caused the, uh, Maria basins to be as they are

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: today, uh, demagnetized the material that, that had been there originally.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's, in other words, the Maria material is less magnetic, it seems, than this material.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, um, interesting thing too is that the, uh, that the samples, as you know, are from the,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: uh, the regolith and they've really physically been modified over the years.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I think that the measurements that we've obtained over, uh, over scale size in the order

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of 10 kilometers indicate that we're looking at a depth below, well below the regolith and

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: that, that this is indicative of, uh, of fields that were at the moon during a, at a time period,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: uh, uh, before in the order of three to four billion years ago, the, uh, direction and the,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the other thing that we can say now from the, um, from measurements of the solar wind, simultaneous

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: measurements of solar wind and magnetic fields at the Apollo 12 and 15 site, we can say that

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: these high fields that you measured at the Apollo 16 site modifies drastically the, uh, the direction

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and, uh, interaction of the solar wind with the moon at these places.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It should, uh, channel and charge particles and, uh, either, uh, uh, at different locations,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: uh, asymmetrically on the lunar surface in these areas.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And in some cases that one could now, uh, state that, uh, the scale size of the field are large

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: enough so that you could form a, uh, shock and actually stand off the solar wind over small

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: regions of the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Um, yes, that's covers both of them.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do you have any questions you want to ask the crew concerning, uh, anything about the deployment

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: or any of the experiment that you didn't know about?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Um, Palmer, let me ask you, what is the effect of that rock out there by the big LSM?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Did that hurt it much?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, first, uh, where you, where you parked the rover the first time in the TV camera, we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: were, uh, extremely disturbed because the angle was such, it looked like that rock was as big

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: as the electronics box.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And it looks like that the PRAs were, were, uh, oriented.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Shining right into them and all the IR radiation would really heat us up during the daytime.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, but then the other view, uh, showed that the rock was relatively small compared to the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: dimensions of the box and, uh, didn't affect the, uh, thermal, uh, subsystem at all.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And magnetically, it didn't, uh, they really don't, uh, contain that much oriented field

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: to do anything.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess, uh, one of the things I'd like to say is this, what we intended to do was we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: intended to drive a hundred yards away from the, out in front of the lunar module with

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the, uh, with a rover and, and do a sort of a north-south traverse looking for the best

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: place to deploy ALSEP to, to get it away from all these things.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the, we ran into problems with it, with the UV, uh, and that it took longer to do that

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: last, uh, measurements than anticipated and we couldn't do that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, and I'm sure that somebody looking at the photos can find a better place out in front

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of the lunar module to put the total package.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But I like to say that package is so big and that surface was so blocky and so full

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of craters that under the circumstances, I almost believe we had to take what we got.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I hate to say that, but, man, I just wouldn't believe that that surface was as rough and

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: covered with blocks as it turned out to be.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think I could have still been walking up there with that package if I'd have been looking

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: for a, uh, level spot.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I got up on top of the ridge and I looked over and said, well, there's a good place over

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: there and I ran over there and it didn't look any better than the place I'd just been.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I, well, there's a good place over there and I ran over there and finally after about

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the third time I said, well, look, I'm just going to put this thing down here at best we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: got.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But it's really blocky and a lot of fresh craters there, secondary.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, but I, but I think that the, uh, if, uh, if you look at the, at least the magnetometers,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: if I looked at each of the photos that I could find where you'd taken a picture of both

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the, uh, LSEP magnetometer and the portable, uh, you picked, uh, you didn't put the thing

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: next to rocks or craters on the scale size that was big enough to affect the instrument.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I, I think that's the main criteria, which was, uh, observed during that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: John, did you know the rationale for doing that unplanned, uh, portable magnetometer reading?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, but it doesn't make any difference.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I mean, we did it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can't explain it in real time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's all right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, one, uh, on the hardware, uh, the sun shield on the, uh, LSM, the latch didn't come

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: loose and I kept pulling the, the arms up to try to get that latch loose.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I finally had to hold the arm down and, and, uh, get the latch, uh, loose with the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: other hand.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And then, and then as I tried to lock the thing, the latch didn't fall off.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It, it tangled up into that little wire that locks into the little ball.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, that was, uh, uh, I almost left it, uh, like that without locking it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I mean, in fact, Houston said, go ahead, uh, and leave it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But, uh, one more little effort, the thing finally dropped off.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I thought I was going to disturb the level.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But if you're, it seems like you're satisfied with the level of those.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, uh, the only thing I worry about there is that we've got a level sensor in the thing.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if you disturb that, you can sort of see that jiggle.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But the, uh, the azimuth, you know, when you read that shadow graph off, that's the only

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: measurement we get in azimuth ever.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, so as long as you could, you didn't disturb the, uh, twisting of it, then, uh, it's

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: fine.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you, Palmer.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Next experimenter will be, uh, Dr. Gary Latham.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Passes the size of the experiment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, go ahead.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Question, I was talking about what, what do you wish on the field radians from there?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do you want to talk about that?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Um, gradians from which institute?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, we don't have the, uh, you know, we've got to take out the fluctuations and so we're

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: in from the other institute using the policy team.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, we don't have that, uh, to take some of that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Sorry, Matt.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The actual photo you took of the LSI was taken out after you had deployed the substitute,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: right?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I, uh, the three-footer, I think, was, that's correct, yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, there wasn't any disturbance.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we didn't touch it after that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If there are any questions before or any time after the discussion, feel free to just raise

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: your hand.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you, Mark.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Mark, our fund began, as you know, with the S-4B impact on this mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You also know we lost tracking on it prematurely, which, which, uh, meant that we were not able

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: to get the coordinates and time of the impact independent of our own measurements.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Nevertheless, we could locate it fairly well from the two near stations, 12 and 14, which

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: made it a useful impact at the greater range up to station 15.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, we are looking at those signals now.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It, it, I think we can say that this, uh, peculiarly high velocity mantle, as we called it, that we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: had found in the 12 and 14 region can't be a global feature unless it is exceedingly thin,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: a thin slab of this high velocity stuff.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the signals we got, and I must say this, that, that, that there's always the uncertainty

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: that we really didn't see the first arrival up there because it was at 1100 kilometers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the first signal you see is quite weak.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's always the uncertainty as to whether or not it is the first, the fastest traveling

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: wave in the moment and not something else.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But if it is, uh, then this very high velocity material that we called mantle is not global or

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: an exceedingly thin layer, looks as though we get velocities approaching eight kilometers

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: per second at depths of the moon of, of the order of a hundred kilometers, not nine kilometers

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: per second as we had in the 12 and 14 region.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's also very weak evidence from that signal.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I haven't convinced my colleagues of this yet nor myself really, but, uh, the possibility

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of a, of a reflection from a very deep interface, perhaps a 550 kilometers deep, uh, is there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we're looking for ways to see whether or not that can be verified.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In other words, a primitive core perhaps or some other reflector at very great depth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So this impact, uh, will I think provide very, very useful data despite the loss of tracking.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We would have been, of course, much better off had we been able to photograph that impact

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: area.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I, I understand that the curtailed time in orbit precluded that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is that right, Drew?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We did not photograph it in that S-4B, yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The deployment was good.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think the pictures tell the story.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: As far as I'm concerned, the, uh, instrument does get hot during a lunar day as the other

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: instruments have.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This has been the case in every one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think it's a matter of just, it's just not possible to keep dust off of that shroud.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think when you have to work that close to it and, uh, that that degrades the, the thermal

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: control some, it does not degrade the seismic data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It simply means that the, uh, controllers have more work to do trying to, to maintain the thermal

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: stability.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, it's a problem we faced in every, every one of the missions.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So it's not.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In fact, I thought the deployment, uh, uh, the configuration of the shroud that I saw

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and so on, uh, look, look very, very good.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's one little place where it's raised up is where the cable comes out underneath.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's turned on its age a little bit and, uh, uh, that of course is something of a heat loss,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but it's not, not serious at all.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We, we patted that rascal down because of the 15 problems, but maybe it's, uh, before

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: a guy leaves at, uh, ALSEP site, if he's got a problem like it, maybe it, is ALSEP on 17?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Probably not.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's not.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: ALSEP is on the seismic.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Seismic.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, those rascally things, uh, assume some different kind of, uh, orientation than they

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: did before, before we left, before we left, and maybe you ought to go back one more time

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and make sure those things are, haven't changed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Don't ask me, uh, I think maybe they outgas a little and then take up a different shape.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, it's not only, it's not only your, your near activities.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think when we saw that, that, uh, TV picture degrade on LEM ASSEN, it's obvious that a lot

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of debris is being thrown around and you just can't avoid a good dusting down from that source.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So our, our carefully prepared thermal surfaces act more like black bodies than anybody figured

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: on as a result of all of this.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Then we saw your rover signals, which this time, uh, provided, uh, very, very interesting

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: data, uh, in that they showed rather abrupt changes in signal level as you moved around.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, we're not sure yet what to make of that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We're going to work with Bill Mulberger and his crew carefully on the traverse to see whether

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: or not we can identify specific provinces in which the signal level is quite a bit higher.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess I, I would like to ask your impression, uh, as you were rolling along and given, along

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the given EVAs that you, you felt at, at given times that the rover was bouncing, uh, noticeably

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: more than at other times that might have generated higher signal levels.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Sometimes she was off the ground.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's no doubt about that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: To the, uh, south, uh, EVA 2, that area was a lot rougher than the, uh, traverse route to

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: North Ray Crater.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: My impression of North Ray Crater traverse once we passed Palmetto was, it was really boulder-free

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: area.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Very subdued, old craters, and the rover just sped along, and much like, uh, West Texas-type

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: terrain.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Whereas to the south, it was, uh, really rough.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: John had to maneuver.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And particularly on Survey Ridge, when we were traversing that area with all the secondaries

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and blocks, uh, we managed to be up in here quite a bit, uh, simply because there were so

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: many secondaries and blocks that we had to hit some small ones to avoid the big ones.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, uh, subjective opinion of mine also is that around, at least at stop 13 where we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: actually got off the rover, uh, the regolith did not seem as, as loosely compacted as to

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the south.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, in fact, at North Ray Crater, at Station 11 and 12, it was no more than a couple inches

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: deep because we couldn't get the rake in without bending the tines of the rake.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So the regolith up there was very thin, uh, and I don't know whether that means there's

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: a, just some very cobbly, uh, densely compacted blocks under there from, that were thrown out

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: or, or that are now that much covered or whether we just picked some bad sites.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But we tried to rake twice and both times the only luck we had was kicking stuff into the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: rake.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We couldn't pull the rake through the regolith.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And you couldn't stick the tongs in either.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the tongs wouldn't go in.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And every other place you could take the tongs and stick into the ground, they'd stand

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: up for you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, you know, in general, this area from, from the general character of our signals,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: it gives the appearance of being the thickest pile of, of what we can quite loosely call regolith

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of any of the sites.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I guess Bob Kovach will talk on his results on, on that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, and of course we await his, his, uh, motor firing to give us a little more information

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: on that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, we'll be looking at these rover signals and see if we can, we can somehow pin them

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: down to, to roughness of terrain or, or just what, uh, from the pictures that you took

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: along the way.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, we now have the, the quiet nighttime period and we're waiting for the first moonquake

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of this session, which, which, uh, ought to be, well, I was hoping it would be in the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: last 24 hours.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It wasn't, uh, but should be before May 12th.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So in the next few days, and, and of course with this last station, we now have completed

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: a very nice triangular array.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The other three gave us a very narrow base thing.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now we have a thing with a thousand kilometer baseline, which, which if it lasts for as long

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: as, uh, uh, they appear to be lasting, will give us the tools to really do the job over

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the next couple of years.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, and of course we'll be using that in the S-IVB impact from the next mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'd like to turn to, to one observation reported from orbit that, that has interested us a great

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: deal. And that was the flash that was reported. I, I haven't seen, I understand the transcript

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: is now, it hasn't yet been typed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I haven't seen it yet. So I, that's my only hope for pinning down the time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If you can, if you can help us pin down the time and roughly the location, and we'll certainly

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: look at our records and that would be a, an important piece of data if we, if we recorded

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: that. I would like to ask, was this a colored flash or a white flash?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, what was your, how does it differ from the kind of thing you get with a cosmic ray impact

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: on your brain?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I didn't see any of those.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: He didn't see any of those.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Redhead.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, we're, we're very much excited by that. As far as I know, it's the first report

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of a transient event of some nature that's been seen from orbit.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I, I just have to wait for the, I should have written it down and it just didn't occur

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: to me to write it down.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do we get a time on it at all, Ken?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's on the DSE.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's on the DSE.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If I ever get that off.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well then it would correlate any information we get to the seismic interfaces.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You know, how about its persistence? Did it just, no, it was just, it was just a flash.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, and the way I happened to notice it, I was looking at a, at a horizon that was showing

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: up from solar corona or zodiacal light, whatever you want to call it in that region.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was very shortly after we lost the signal from earth and I was watching stars pop up

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: over the horizon and got this flash which was in size was about, I didn't, I didn't, I wasn't

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: looking directly at it at the time, it hadn't been happening down in the side of my vision,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but it was brighter than the, than the brightest star that I had in the field of view at the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I had the feeling that it was a, in physical or angular size, it was equivalent to the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: size of the larger stars in, in my perceived vision.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But it was just a, it was just an instantaneous flash and that it took us a couple of seconds

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: for it to soak into me that it wasn't just a star popping up over the horizon, but rather,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: it had been distinctly below the horizon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is there a way for me to get that transcript?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I don't know if I would normally get it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'm glad, I'm glad you asked.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, that's it?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I forgot to mention this in the opening remarks, but we have about 50 copies of this

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: technical air to ground voice transcript right back there and for the PIs and the COIs

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and there's a copy for you, Gary Beck.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Gary, that's not what you're after.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It won't be on now.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I need the tape recorder.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It won't be on now.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, the DSE.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's on the DSE.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that hasn't been completed as far as I know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: One other thing that I'd like to mention, from orbit it appeared to me that there was a distinctly

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: different unit up around North Ray in an area that probably, I'd say, a third or a half

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: of the traverse to North Ray went across.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that may or may not fit in with your seismic deltas.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That at some point between North Ray and LM, they would cross a contact of some kind.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, sir.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, except to add my thanks for a very fine deployment, that's all I have.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any questions from the floor?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I don't know where the S4B hit, but this is on the backside of the limb, so I would

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: assume that the S4B didn't hit there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And it was well after that, like a couple of days, lunar days.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Where did the S4B impact?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, it hit about 150 kilometers north of Station 12.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The time I was doing this, I was looking out the window, and I had darkened the cockpit

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: in preparation for one of the low light level photographic exercises.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that's how I happened to be noticing that there was this distinct horizon which surprised

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: me.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I just happened to be kind of puzzling over that at the time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any other questions?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Not when your visor's down.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Your visor's up?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I never looked with the visor.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Supposed to do that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I suspect, from what we saw on EVA on the way home, that the inner visor alone has sufficient

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: attenuation to block out the stars.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But you could see them through the AOT in the lunar module.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, of course, that has a light shield around it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: On our last alignment, even with a crescent Earth in the AOT, we could see Arknar.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was really so good that we didn't even have to roll up the window shades in the cockpit.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, with a proper, if you look through a tube, I'm sure you could see every star up there?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The only thing we saw on the lunar surface was the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And you had to, it was directly overhead.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That was the only thing I saw in the sky.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: John, when you were looking through the sight of the camera, did you see anything beside the camera?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You see your helmet reflected.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's what you see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You have to raise your visor to get all that, so you can get rid of all those reflections.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, next one is active seismic experiment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Kovach?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, we had several objectives on this experiment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'd like to summarize these basic questions like how thick is the seismic regolith would be one question.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: What were the in-situ physical properties of the lunar near-surface material?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And thirdly, are there any distinct seismic horizons?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And how do they correlate with our estimates to geological horizons?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And finally, were there any regional differences in seismic velocities, i.e. something characteristically different between the Mari and the Highlands?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, the deployment and the execution of the thumper experiment was outstanding.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I mean, the records are clearer, and the background noise was sufficiently low.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I mean, we got clean first breaks completely down the geophone line.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Couldn't have asked for better.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'm sorry about that first one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I was so really happy when that rascal worked that I stopped walking.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I started walking to the next one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, the record shows that for some reason you inadvertently didn't hold it in a charged position.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: sufficiently long enough, and that's the reason when you did it the second time it worked.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, I thought I started walking too soon after the first one went off.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The one that failed, yeah, that was pure procedure there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, if you walked too soon, it didn't hurt us any.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Didn't bother you? Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The data needs yet to be corrected for topographic effects.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's some severe undulations in the topography, and we can see this in the data,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but I can give you some first impressions of our results.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Number one, there's certainly no variability in the first arrival velocities across the geophone array,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the apparent velocity, or the velocity, is again very close to 100 meters per second,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: which seems to be the magic number for the regolith at many different places now on the moon,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: i.e. out in the Maury and now up here and finally up in this highland site.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There are no evidence of flows beneath this geophone line.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I feel sufficiently confident we would have recognized that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, the fact that we didn't recognize any variability in the velocity,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we were able to say one more thing, because we recorded the limb ascent when we turned on the geophone line,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and that was positioned some 140 meters away from our first geophone.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we did get a faster apparent velocity, and it's very close to the value measure for Fra Amaro for Breccius.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And so, with this type of a number now, i.e. 200 to 300 meters per second underlying this regolith,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we can put a thickness bound on the regolith at this site, and it is indeed very thick, at least 40 meters.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I'll be able to refine that number a little bit when we get the mortars fired.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We also did turn on the ASE geophone array and recorded, you know, your rover approaching the limb during the end of EVA 3,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and we also got very interesting signals, and we hope to analyze these in an analogous way, as Gary has suggested.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that's about all I can say for the quick look of our date at this point.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We do have the concern, of course, I do have the concern about the grenade box deployment, I'm sure I've asked you that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I haven't seen any of the pictures yet, so maybe it'll be self-explained, but maybe you could reassure me that it's level.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's level, I guarantee you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In fact, that was probably the only level place we had it around there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I was really pleased to see when we got out to where we could deploy it that it would be level.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's really good. And I reported the, I don't remember what azimuth heading that we put it on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was very close. It seemed like it was 3-3-0 as opposed to 3-3-3 that it should have been on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's off the top of my head. We had to go back and look, but I reported it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I found out later that you could break that pin by pulling on the leg, but I certainly didn't know that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If somebody told me that doing the training, why it had gone right over my head.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But we do have three good legs in there, and I'll bet you that rascal can't get out of the ground,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: because the way it went in, it's sort of like pushing it into quicksand.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And once it gets in there, I defy anybody to get that mortar box back out of there,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: because it really grabbed ahold of it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, again, I'd like to offer my thanks for an outstanding execution of the experiment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We couldn't ask for anything better.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you. It was our pleasure. Boy, it really worked good. I was really pleased.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any questions from the forest?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: How do you define the regular size?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, we define the regular, I don't know how the geologist may not agree with what you define,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but we define it as material which apparently covers much of the lunar surface

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and has this characteristic velocity of 100 meters per second.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And what comes up from that?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Underneath this particular size, I am something that has velocities like the fraught marble, breaches.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You said something about you were sure that there was no flow material underneath this.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess I missed the conclusion.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, we've done enough experiments on Earth,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I say that we've been able to recognize flows because the velocities are characteristically much higher.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if you want to argue that there may be very thin flows,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: i.e. thinner than our sampling wavelength, which is like two to three meters, they could be there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But we certainly, on the average, didn't see any big sequence of high velocity flows.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: When you say high velocity, this two or three hundred that you're talking about from the essence stage,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: that's not high enough.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's not high enough.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, every small crater that we looked into with exception, probably a Buster Crater,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we never saw anything that looked like anything but, I mean, it just looked like more of the same,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: looked like regolith.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I mean, you know, we never saw anything that looked like outcropper,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and we were sure looking for it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This two to three hundred meter velocity,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: about the limb acid, that was the stretch of material that you say is underlying the regolith.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is that right?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's my first look, yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: First look.
