transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: When do you fire the mortars?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, that's another good question.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: What's the latest word on mortar firing?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do we have any idea about when?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, there's a meeting at one o'clock this afternoon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'm going to request to fire it on May the 23rd.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Bastille Day, is that it?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And it's armed, too.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, our next subject is the solar wind composition.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Meister?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Unfortunately, there is not much to tell about the solar wind composition experiment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The foil was transferred to Switzerland at the end of last week,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and we don't have any results yet, of course.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The foil was deployed during the first EVA

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and retrieved at the end of the third EVA

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: with a total exposure time of 45 hours and five minutes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's some three hours longer than the record of the previous missions,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: which was about 52 hours on Apollo 15.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The main difference between the foil of Apollo 16

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the ones of the previous missions

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: is that some pieces of platinum foil have been attached to the previous design,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: which was composed of a pure aluminum foil.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: These platinum foil pieces can be cleaned by fluoridic acid,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: which allows to remove all the possible lunar dust contamination.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This technique has been tested in the lab on bombarded foils

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and showed that you can remove essentially all the lunar dust contamination

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: without losing any measurable amount of trapped rare gas ions or atoms of solar wind origin.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This technique should allow us to determine the isotopic composition of the rare gas elements of solar wind origin

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: up to the mass of possible krypton.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The first visual inspection of the foil here at MSC showed that the foil is crimpled,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but essentially free of lunar dust.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's of course only a visual observation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We don't know how the foil looks like under microscope.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I would like to thank the crew for the proper deployment and retrieval of the foil.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We are very pleased with what the foil looks like.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you very much.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can't miss when it tells you where the sun is.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, point this at sun.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The thing didn't roll up like I thought it was going to,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I'm sorry I had to crinkle it, but it was so big that I had to squeeze it down to get it into the bag,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and it ripped once too.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess you saw that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's only a problem of aesthetics.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It doesn't hurt the scientific value.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, good.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I didn't think it did.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Don?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If the local magnetic fuel is standing off of a solar windier,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: it's going to overlap like that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We don't know yet that we have discrimination between the lighter and heavier elements in the solar wind.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We have to check that maybe that there's a dependence on the height over the lunar surface of the composition

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: between the heavier and lighter elements, but we have to check that first and see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The lighter particles would be deflected much more than the heavier ones.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can you see those, I don't know, this is probably a stupid question,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but these particles that cause the light flashes, I was seeing them on the lunar surface during the sleep periods.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do those things register on your experiment?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, they have higher energies and they go through the foil.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Huh?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That was your question.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: While we were closer to thinking bulky, could you tell any difference in the materials between the time you deployed and the time you brought back?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No difference there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Looking at it one time out the window, I thought I saw some white streaks on it,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but that might have been just the way the sun was.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It might have been those platinum strips that I'd never noticed when I emplaced it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I really don't know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So it just looked like it had a couple of randomly oriented streaks on it to me from the limb window.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But when we rolled it back up again, instead of rolling straight up, it rolled out in a big long thing and I had to redo it again.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And when that happened, I ripped it and then had to crunch it down.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We don't see any difference between the foil we sent up and the foil that came down, except of some lunar dust on it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Nothing else.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can I ask the crew a question?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do you have an idea how the foil was oriented?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Was it essentially vertical to the...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The foregrounds.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I mean along the gravitational force lines or was it reclined or inclined?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's hard to tell it from...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think I put it in almost parallel to the gravity vector there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's on a slope, a little slope, but if I recall, it's aligned almost vertically.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you very much.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The next subject will be the cosmic ray detector, Dr. Bob Fleischer.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: See here?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: He's not here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The PIs could be here this morning.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: They're busily at home studying the data that they got back.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I have some words from them that I'll pass along as to what they think they'll be able to see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: They are very excited about the possibilities they have.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Early in the mission there was a solar particle event that occurred which will enhance their data very significantly, they think.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: They think they'll have the opportunity to see particles from the sun that on an ordinary mission they would have never had the opportunity to see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: When they got the experiment back, panel one did have considerable dust on it, and this, from the best we can tell without any analysis, came from the landing itself, from the blast up from the DPS.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Panel one was hot.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In the, taking the panels apart, panels two and three were cooler, and panel four was of the same order of temperatures as panel two and three.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The cosmic ray data itself in the plastics appears to be degraded somewhat because of the temperature, but they're very hopeful that a great part of the data will be retrievable.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: At the first look on panel two, Dr. Flesher says that the number of particles they see on the plastics indeed are a great deal higher than they would have nominally anticipated indicating the effects of the solar particle event.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, they really haven't, uh, in detail etched the plastics or analyzed them, they're just beginning to do that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: They think they are usable?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, the plastics.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I was really surprised because, uh, we had some lengthy discussions about this pre-flight, and I could never understand how we're gonna fly this rascal to the moon and get it there with this, with these long periods of attitude hold that we're going into where it might see plus 250 all the time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, of course, I'm sure those three revs in lunar orbit prior to landing didn't do any good, uh, either, because we were oriented, uh, many times so that we were facing with, uh, to maintain communications.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We had the sun shining on that rascal, uh, all the way around.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, I really think it, those 140 temperatures that we saw on the panels, if you go back and look at it thermally, you're gonna find out they were there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It had to be there long before we ever got the thing on the ground.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You know, and I was really concerned about that as to why we didn't put some kind of shield in over it, but it was too late, I guess, to do that sort of thing.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, the thermal design was such that it could sit, I believe, in direct sunlight almost indefinitely without any degradation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's the IR heating off the lunar surface that really cooks it from, that's what the thermal people say.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I think, and it's hard to say, and I, we did see the, the early picture did show that the temple labels had already changed, uh, early at the beginning of the EVA.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: They were black first time we looked at them.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, uh, a guess is the 15 hours, the, the thermal analysis says if there's like 15% dust on the panel after, uh, 20, uh, degrees of sun angle or so, you will sort of exceed the 140 degrees on the frame.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, it appeared that there was probably 50 or 60% dust on the lower part of the panel, or maybe even higher than that, and it spent about 15 hours on the surface.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, so it, it may have just turned out to be a, a number of problems that, uh, probably, uh, ones that could not be avoided under the circumstances that caused that lower panel to overheat.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was the hottest, and the next panel was, uh, about 20 degrees cooler, the best we can tell, and the panel, third panel up was 10 degrees cooler than the second panel.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So it seemed to be a dust problem, but, uh, it doesn't seem to, to have hurt the data too much.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Panel four was the one, uh, which, uh, was, uh, we were afraid wasn't going to be activated because of the anomaly on the red lanyard.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But after they have taken the panel apart, apparently every portion of the experiment was activated to some degree or another.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The neutron portion, uh, was partially, uh, deployed, and they think they will get some data from it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's not, not as much data statistically as they wish they had.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But, uh, uh, every portion of panel four, uh, uh, does look like it will provide some, uh, some useful data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And they, uh, have a lot, uh, higher hopes now than they did when they first saw the gear.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Apparently the problem, and we haven't, again, haven't sent the hardware back to the manufacturer for analysis,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but apparently was, uh, a malfunction in the assembly, uh, that caused that, uh, thing to jam.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, we could have pulled, if I'd have known about it at the time, uh, we could have got that pair of pliers out of there and pulled harder.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The investigator's opinion was it would have done no good.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was very severely jammed, and, uh, he doesn't think any additional effort would have, would have, uh, would have freed it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was jammed pretty bad.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But, uh, I think in all, they're, they're very excited about the data, and I think they're very optimistic now that they'll get a considerable amount of data from it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Tim, it's probably worth mentioning on all the plastic panels overheated, but they did have calibration plastics in there,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and they'd be able to, but the effect would be overheated just to anneal the cracks and reduce the crack density,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but with the calibration in there, they'd be, they'd almost have an effect.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The other thing is that on panel four is that those experiments which are activated by pulling the cord

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: are only a small fraction of the total part of the panel cord, so there's a lot of panel four that isn't involved at all.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's true.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, uh, that's for all practical purposes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I don't think we, uh, in fact, I'm sure we, you may find a fingerprint on there, but if there is, it, we, uh,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we really were careful, uh, to get it out of there, and we didn't, uh, once we got it loose,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we gave the usual 10-11 care and folded it up, so I don't think there's any crew fingerprints on the panel surfaces.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, that's correct. We looked at it very carefully, and it was, except for the bottom part of the panel one,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: that you could see it was a spray pattern, and, uh, it was very clean, and the PIs were very pleased about that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This, uh, cell type of event, did you notice more than that occurred?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, it started on about, uh, I believe Monday, which was the day after launch, and went through about Wednesday.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was about a two- or three-day type event. I think the peak was, uh, must have been about Tuesday.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There are some satellite data available, and I don't have that on hand.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was a small event, but for this solar cycle, it was very surprising that it happened at all during the mission,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: that to have it during the portion when the cosmic ray was deployed, or available to accept data,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: the probability of that's very small, so it's a very gratifying thing to occur.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'm curious about the, uh, dust being kicked up by the DPS.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Um, did you guys observe any dust on the thing, or any other part of the limb at that level?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Because, uh, it's always been our impression that the dust is sent out in a pretty thin layer,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but you don't get a billowing effect.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I'm sure it's sent out in a thin layer,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but with all those frontal blocks around there, it's a possibility some of it could come back at you, that's for sure.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was extremely hard to see, and when we photographed it, the lights are not similar to the sun,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: probably much less in intensity, but yet the photographic lights did wash out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's a very pale, uh, kind of dust, but it's very predominant.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And it came up from the corner, Dave, in a pattern that you would expect it to be blown,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and there were some black streaks in there that appeared to be melted something or other on it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I think they are going to attempt to chemically analyze the material on it,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and try to find out what it is.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: How high above the surface, or up, down the left?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That first panel must be about chest high, is it not?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any other questions?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: One, just one comment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That was, uh, the frame of that thing was hot, really, it was hot.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That was the only thing I felt through my gloves the whole state.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, it was jammed, and John tried to pull it out, and I was holding the frame,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I started feeling it through my gloves.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Did you get any feel for why it was jamming, or where it was jamming?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Did you have any clue, or what caused it?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was jamming at the base.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, not at the bottom.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right, right at the bottom part.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, it was something that broke free right at the base,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and then it just came out like it had grease on it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Maybe we spilled some orange juice on it or something.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No way.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's the only thing we didn't spill orange juice on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's not that you didn't try, huh?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's a good cement, you guys.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You ought to start thinking about that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dispose that stuff to vacuum, boy.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, our next experiment was the far-UV camera.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Page?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, for the benefit of some of the geologists here, I'll recount the goals and purposes of this experiment,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: which were to obtain photographs in the far ultraviolet of the geocorona in the upper atmosphere of the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I should have said these photographs, of course, include spectra as well.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And solar wind, clouds, possibly interstellar hydrogen, colors of stars in the far ultraviolet, and possibly intergalactic hydrogen.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We had a lot of troubles, I guess John well knows.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Before launch, the difficulty was to keep the camera dry because its optically sensitive surface would immediately run away if it got damp.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And this was accomplished with a bag that caused Captain Young a little bit of trouble in the practices in advance,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: but apparently worked all right on the lunar surface.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's great.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The second difficulty was getting through the Van Allen belts without fogging our film,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I'll show you in a moment that we did that all right with a rather small amount of shielding around the film cassette.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Then we had some difficulty with the limb being in the way.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This came about because of the delay in touchdown, high sun angle,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the necessity to keep the camera close to the limb so that it would be in the shadow.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: With its gold surface, it would have heated up very rapidly if it had been out in the full sunlight.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The accomplishments that I will show you in a moment on the screen include 92 photographs in Limon Alpha imagery,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and 53 spectra, some of them extending from 500 angstroms to 1550 angstroms.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's, I think, the farthest into the ultraviolet anybody's ever taken astronomical pictures.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We may get evidence of gases in the lunar atmosphere from several of our pointings which were low across the lunar horizon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if anything were coming out like geysers of water or whatever it is, we'll certainly pick it up.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The data on these photographs are extremely numerous, and it'll take us an estimated six months to a year to get them all out,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: which will be done with the big computer here at the MSC.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, Dr. George Carruthers, who is the PI and who designed the camera,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: happened to be free today from work on an Arabi flight, and he's here,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and will undoubtedly make comments whenever he sees something to comment on the photographs.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do we have the first slide?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I might say that I got into trouble with the American Photographers' Union in thanking the prints of these,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: because I'm not a member of that unit, and they tried to throw me out of the dark over here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is probably one of the most dramatic pictures of the Earth that shows auroral belt on the dark side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You're looking at the Earth with the sun off to your right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The south pole of the Earth is down, and that funny lip-like thing sticking off to the left at the bottom

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: is aurora, we think, around the south magnetic pole.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The most striking thing is the next lip up, which on the original you can see better than on this slide,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: goes around the full backside of the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's called the equatorial auroral belt, and disappears back of the dark side in the upper left corner.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The third lip is another belt.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It looks at first as if that was just all one, but there are two separate belts there,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and it was quite unexpected.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This photo...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: What's the dimension of the Earth's actual size?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, you know, it's 8,000 miles cross.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's some halation here, and I guess I'm not too sure, and perhaps George knows.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is a special Eastman NTB3 emulsion, very, very thin.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, of course, the exposure was made with electrons, not with light.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's an electronographic camera.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But the dimension works out right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can't see it too well on this print.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's a ring or a limit to the field, which on the originals is 30 millimeters across.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's 20 degrees in the sky, and the Earth is 2 degrees, and it checks out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So the dimension you see there is 2 degrees across the full diameter of the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You say this is the equatorial auroral belt.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think what I'm trying to say is that what is the third line from the bottom?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is that the back side you see, or...?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, you can't see through the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's why I asked you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is the Earth's the power of the Earth?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The geometry is such that that is probably inclined 30 degrees to the magnetic equator,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and is an unexpected auroral belt.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It'll take a little more figuring to figure this out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: What was the latitude of that third belt?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: As I just said, my guess, looking at the picture, it hasn't been measured accurately,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: it's 30 degrees north.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's just the standard of bio gas realm.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You'll notice on these pictures that they're overprinted.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's because I'm not a member of the Photographers' Union,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the originals have a good deal more on them.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This picture was taken excluding hydrogen light, Lyman Alpha.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We have two filters on the camera, and this one is taken in light between the wavelengths of 12, 30, and 1550 angstroms.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, the next slide.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can I start?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is the whole diameter you're seeing there, is that all the Earth, or is that twice what the Earth is?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, it's the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Just the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The whole thing you're seeing is the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is that twice the image?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, no.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's, as I said, the little halation, which makes it a little bigger than it ought to be.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's only a few percent.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, a few percent.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, in this one, it's exactly the same view.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was taken after John so accurately pointed the camera at the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The Earth is in the middle there, and if you look real hard, you can see the dark side of it off to your left.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is the geocorona.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The streaks are an instrumental matter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Actually, we have a barrier membrane that George put very close in front of the film to keep visible light from getting in there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the barrier membrane wasn't quite uniform, and that's where the streaks come from.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The circular thing on the right is an overlap, another defect.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The little motor that advanced the film between exposures didn't pull it quite far enough for this one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And those dust spikes, I guess, are my pipe tobacco on the slide.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You know, Thornton, that Rastley thing was moving.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And at first it wasn't moving.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The wheels weren't going as far as they did toward the end.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, we have a complete transcript of everything you said about it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And in looking at the film, which I've done in great detail, you can see the most serious defect in that film advance was during your short exposures on the Earth, John.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Everywhere else it worked fine.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I have an idea that pushing the buttons so frequently sort of confused the motor, and it didn't turn as far as it should have.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, in any case, you'll notice that the shape of the geocorona is as predicted by Dr. Meyer at the Naval Research Lab.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's got a dimple in the back, down sun.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The sun is still to the right here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And our other photographs show that it extends at least twice as far as you see here off to the right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The print, of course, can be printed dark or light.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if I printed this one lighter, I'd have got the background all over the whole slide, and you wouldn't have been able to see as pretty a picture as this.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, the next slide shows the one further to the right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The sun is still to your right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The Earth now is off the edge of the picture to the left.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This was one of the sequence taken through the night between EBAs 2 and 3.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You see a star background here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And again, the geocorona, those streaks which are not real, extending actually right across this frame,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: if you print the thing lighter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, the next slide shows the two of these combined.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that printed a lot darker.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I guess it's not as artistic an effort as I had hoped.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The geocorona produces hydrogen in 1216 angstroms, lina alpha.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the next slide shows the spectrum actually taken on that first slide.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The spectrum is, dispersion is vertical.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that white band across horizontally, roughly horizontally, is lina alpha.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And you see how strong it is.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The Earth is in the middle of this picture, and the spectrum of the upper atmosphere is spread out on that vertical line,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: from far ultraviolet down at the bottom to nearer ultraviolet up at the top.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: A bright line just above lina alpha is 1304, which is the oxygen line.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And George, do you want to describe this in a little more detail?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've, so far, only made a very crude analysis of the spectra by comparison with the laboratory spectra made in the preflight calibrations.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: However, we have tentatively identified the 584 line of helium, the 834 line of ionized oxygen, the 1026 line of limon beta of hydrogen,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: these three lines are the first spectral measurements in the Earth's upper atmosphere.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: All previous measurements have been limited to wavelengths longward of 1,100 angstroms,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: which we also cover and which includes the Lyman alpha line in 1216, the 1304 and 1356 lines of atomic oxygen,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the Lyman-Berge-Hopfield bands of molecular nitrogen between 1,200 and 1,600 angstroms.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The Lyman alpha line, of course, is by far the strongest emission that we have seen in any of our spectra,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and it's the only one that we have conclusively identified in any of the spectra that do not include the Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: However, by comparison of spectra taken with and without our lithium fluoride corrector plate, which cuts off at 1050 angstroms,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: we will be able to determine whether we see a general background in the 584 line of helium and the 1026 line of atomic oxygen hydrogen,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: as we expect, though they will be much weaker than the Lyman alpha line.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've got that other spectrum coming.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In other words, can you hold on a minute?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think the order he's got him in has the Magellanic cloud, and we're probably taking too much time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can we have the next slide?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, that's it. Go ahead.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So this is without the corrector plate.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You'll notice that the Lyman alpha here is broader.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The definition is poorer, but as George was just saying, we get lines further down in the ultraviolet on spectra

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: taken without the corrector plate than with it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And you see here, too, these other lines are not uniform.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is a spectrum that was obtained with the Earth off the edge here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So it shows that the geochrona goes right across this slide, as I said last time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: By the way, that's 100,000 miles.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the other lines here show that either other materials in the geochrona or beyond the geochrona.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess it's going to take a little while to figure out which are which.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Go ahead. I didn't get a question.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is that any more to say about it?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess, yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The next two slides quickly show the, well, that's right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The Magellanic Clouds, which are, well, John was worried about what LNC meant,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and this is the Large Magellanic Cloud, and that's the initial, what the initials referred to.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The picture on the left is with hydrogen, with lamin alpha.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the picture on the right is without.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In this far ultraviolet region, all that you are seeing here are the very hot blue stars.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And over here you see the clouds of hydrogen gas.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So the difference between these two photographs is hydrogen.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we get the record of, well, the Magellanic Clouds are nearby galaxies,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: so we have a galaxy with all of the stars and neutrons and whatnot spread out in front of us to study.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, Carl Hennei has made special studies of these Magellanic Clouds and is very much interested

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and already has copies of these photographs for the study.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You notice that the hydrogen is not just from the Magellanic Clouds.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The stuff up here is out in the open sky, and just what caused that background, I don't know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is there any other slide?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's the last one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We had a couple of questions for John.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: One was that sticking which had us worried.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You talked about the instrument may flying Apollo 17.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Robert, it's very Houston in it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So what was the sticking?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Did it continue right through?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You didn't mention it in EVA-3.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It got worse all along.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I just got the feeling there was some kind of hang-up in possibly long-term vacuum exposure

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: or something to the operation of the way it was working in azimuth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I never was able to, or never able to really...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It never got better.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, it never got better.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In fact, the longer it sat there, maybe the cold, it just seemed to get stickier and stickier.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Toward the end there, every time I had to, every time I got to a new setting in azimuth,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: it completely destroyed the level.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we were unfortunate that we were on that slope right there under the foot pad of the limb.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And so I had to go back and re-level it every time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that was, we were really working at the limits of the level ability of the machinery, I think, there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You see that it didn't make much difference.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That Magellanic Cloud should have been out in the middle.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I know, I know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And you were off by that much because...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But, well, that's...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If we were on a level slope, there would have been no problem in getting a bubble right in the middle every time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if the azimuth had worked easily, it would have remained level.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But I sure don't know what it was.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It couldn't have been dust that got in the...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We thought that was impossible.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, I don't think we had any...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In fact, I'm sure we didn't have any dust on the legs up that far.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The film cassette you brought back had very little dust on it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In fact, it looked brand new.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I hope...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If it got dust on it, it got it inside the limb.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There was plenty in there once we got into zero gravity.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Although, I don't know how to crawl through two bags.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's why I was quite surprised there was no dust in the bag.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In fact, we're disappointed because we're going to collect a little bit of dust off it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any questions on the floor?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I'm sure it got some dust on it when I removed it, though.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I got a little...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: A very small amount, which I'm legally keeping it with this.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Don't tell anybody.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The FBI will be around to see you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Did you see evidence of the magneto sheet or a bow shot?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So far, we have not seen any discontinuity in the up-sun geocorona, which would be indicative of that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It just sort of dribbles off the way.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: As you go sunward from the Earth, then there's no sharp drop.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But we're really not as far as the...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Ten or the radiation should have been in the middle of that up-sun.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is it only...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's only ten.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Twelve.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any more questions?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Next subject is the lunar geology investigation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Mulverter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Mulverter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Mulverter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Mulverter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dr. Mulverter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: For the benefit of the astrologer in the crowd, there's been very little evidence for water, and none so far for geysers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Our experiment may not be as far-reaching as theirs, but on the other hand, I think we've made a large step toward understanding the history of the moon, and therefore the Earth, and therefore the solar system.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if you guys can find any more, we're out there with you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So far, we've completed the mission itself, and all major objectives for the preplanned traverses were reached, and were sampled, and were described, and photographed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And as far as we can tell with our quick look at the photographs, all of these were done well.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've produced a so-called greenback at the end of the mission operations itself, which was a summary as of our knowledge at that time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was based on crew observations, TV, and the pre-mission data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Included in that thing are station sample maps, which were derived from the TV in real time, and that was a very useful tool to us.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: A sample inventory, a film usage inventory, and a station locations, again, resected from the TV pans.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: By the end of last week, we've received black and white two-time enlargements of all film.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: These are the typical drugstore-quality prints, and sooner or later, we'll get good quality, so our analysis is very brief.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've assembled all the panoramas.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Sample location studies are nearing completion.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The film inventory is also nearing completion.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The geological analysis is still in its infancy, and I suspect it should progress rapidly now that we've got all this inventorying over with.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You guys took so damn many pictures, it takes time to get them organized.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've had one session with the crew in the LRL with samples, and most of our questions need samples in hand,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and those I'm sure we'll be able to discuss later.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And so the questions I've got relate more to surface observations that maybe we can amplify.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And some of these are questions that we've asked you before, but I have a few polaroid prints of these photos that maybe can jostle our minds,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: and assist in refining some of the answers that we've gotten on the debriefs after the EVAs or on trans-Earth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Our photo-geological mapping group primarily talked about rays by their whiteness.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There were a few spots where they thought they were seeing dark rays.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You recognize both light and dark colored rays, particularly the south ray picture.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: If I could have slide one, please, which is the south ray panorama and the print I've just given to the crew a single frame from that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There I think we can see light and dark, and the real question I'm after is what led you to say that you were on or off a ray?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And secondly, were there any visible differences in the rock types as you drove by or had a chance of sampling ray material?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The hills are at the bottom.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I think the thumbprint goes in the upper right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Could the projectionist give that a 180, please, around a horizontal axis?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That one's got the same problem. There we go.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now it's a hill instead of a hole.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is your pan from Station 4.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You see that black line coming over the...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This photo really doesn't do that same justice.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Polaroid prints never do.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I mean, you really have to see it to believe it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That white is so much whiter than the contrast that we were able to get out of the photographs.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think when I looked at it, my assessment of this, which is kind of a bad place, was that it was a black ray coming out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The right rim there on the photograph.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And it probably went right down that, as you know, the photograph that showed the black area coming out of South Ray.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And there's a series of black blocks.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's a bunch right there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Left edge.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And there's also...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And Charlie described this in real time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's some more black blocks in there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And they seem to come out in ray patterns, too.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Don't you think, Charlie?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That rascally...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's one spectacular crater.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That ray coming down the south right edge might have been the ray that made, or at least part of it, that made Survey Ridge.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Because it just ran right across those wrecked trap craters, and we could see it going all the way down.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is that the bright ray you're talking about in the lower right?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This ray right here, Bill, came right through Stubby, right up over, and right out of Survey Ridge.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This one right here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So that was the source of your terrific block field there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, man.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And just amazing how much rocks a rascal laid down.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I just couldn't believe it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Traffic ability in close to that thing would probably have been very interesting.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: We should have had another EVA to find out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think it's a heat flow one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The reason we called we were on a ray was really an abundance of secondary craters and an abundance of blocks.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
