text: And they thinned and thickened as we, I think, traverse raised, but we never did get totally out of blocks to the south, to the traverse to the south.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There were always five, at least three to five percent of the surface had cobbles, and I say cobbles, 20 centimeter blocks, and larger.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the blocks were generally asymmetrical enough to the crater, or the crater shape was elongated, or just a great spattering of craters is why you're calling them secondaries?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think subjectively we felt they were oriented from south ray all the time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was really just a subjective field as we were driving by them.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There were a lot of the blocks that were not associated with any craters.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There would be a pile of a series of secondaries, but around for a couple of hundred meters, there'd be more blocks.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: In fact, as far as you could see, there'd be blocks just scattered over the surface that were not associated with any secondaries.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But the true secondaries were, we did see some that were classic, where they were, you could, the ejector was down range from, and it pointed right to the south ray.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Station four, for instance, was one that was...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can I have slide four, please?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I might add that these black rays and the black blocks that you see here were also evident at baby ray.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can you rotate that one, too?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And to a more, or to a lesser degree, the sampling at north ray had an appearance of being black and white matrixed, black and white rocks also.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The north ray rocks.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do these black streaks go all into the crater themselves, down vertically down into the sides of the crater?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: At south ray, yeah. That one on the left that you saw there was, you could track it over the rim and back right across the rim.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And Ken, could you see that from orbit? You can see a lot of these fresh, but like black streak craters.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: This one, south ray does not have nearly the obvious dark streaks that run down inside and outside that many of the other craters do.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There was dark material, dark appearing material, it was very obvious, in the crater interior.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But I never recognized it as being a ray that was thrown out with a radial dimension.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I think, looking at the photography, the feeling we got from looking at south ray was that that black streak was just an absence of any rays.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: But I think, from the blocks, it must be black ray material.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Dark material.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Maybe the dark matrix rocks would produce that darkening.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: It petered out a lot faster than the white rays, though.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, I mean, you know, within a quarter of a crater diameter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I think it was from the bottom of it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: From the bottom of it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Those could disappear just because of their general appearance.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Could.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Like the local regolith, the white ones being so obviously different, it would be easier to recognize.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: I suspect why the mappers did the same thing.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here's your pan, John, or part of it, looking up sun.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And this crater you suggested was the secondary.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And therefore, the sampling that you were doing primarily over there to the left corner is where the rover is,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: would be south ray ejecta as the principal source.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's one reason we wanted to move you on, and I think that was a good decision now that we look at your photographs and from what you had told us.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, we sampled this crater up on this close-in rim and down the rim a little bit, but I, man, if that's not a classic secondary, I never saw one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's type locality, if you pardon the geological verbiage.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And you can see the debris from there. It's scattered all out in here, too.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: The rover's back over here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Down slope.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can see it right in the left corner, just the edge of it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I think you're standing there, Charlie.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
text: Probably on my face.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764796 1920x1080 9000k
